title: Alnylam and Inceptive Ink Up-to-$2 Billion AI-Driven RNA Drug Discovery Deal
headline: Alnylam Pharmaceuticals partners with Inceptive Nucleics in a three-year AI collaboration worth up to $2 billion to accelerate discovery of novel RNAi therapeutics.
key_facts: $30 million upfront, comprising cash and an equity investment in privately held Inceptive Additional payments tied to pre-clinical, regulatory, and sales milestones bring total potential value to ~$2 billion Three-year collaboration term

title: Otsuka's Voyxact (Sibeprenlimab) Shows Positive Phase 3 VISIONARY eGFR Data in I
headline: Otsuka presents interim Phase 3 VISIONARY data showing Voyxact (sibeprenlimab-szsi) preserved kidney function over 12 months versus placebo in adults with primary IgAN at risk for disease progression.
key_facts: Voyxact preserved kidney function (eGFR) compared to placebo over 12 months Demonstrated "clinically meaningful improvements across key markers of IgAN" Data presented at ERA (European Renal Association) Congress 2026

title: Lundbeck Presents Phase IIb PROCEED Data for Bocunebart (Anti-PACAP mAb) in Migr
headline: Lundbeck's bocunebart (Lu AG09222), a first-in-class anti-PACAP monoclonal antibody, met its primary endpoint in the Phase IIb PROCEED trial in migraine prevention but showed a modest treatment difference that disappointed some analysts.
key_facts: Treatment difference of 1.38 monthly migraine days vs. placebo Trial enrolled patients who had failed 1-4 prior preventive therapies (refractory population) Primary endpoint met

title: Replimune Plans Third FDA Submission for RP1 Melanoma Drug After Two Rejections
headline: Replimune announces plans for a third FDA submission of RP1 (oncolytic immunotherapy for melanoma) after "productive" talks with the agency, following rejections in June 2025 and April 2026.
key_facts: First CRL: June 2025; Second CRL: April 10, 2026 Replimune reached agreement with FDA on May 29, 2026 to resubmit FDA will treat the resubmission as "urgent"

title: Fulcrum Therapeutics Explores Sale After Discontinuing Sickle Cell Drug Pociredi
headline: Fulcrum Therapeutics initiates strategic review—potentially resulting in a sale—after discontinuing pociredir for sickle cell disease following FDA feedback linking PRC2 inhibitors to malignancy risks.
key_facts: Announced June 2, 2026 Stock dropped 53.6% on the news FDA flagged malignancy risks across the PRC2 inhibitor class

title: Takeda Swings to Full-Year Loss on $2.5 Billion Jury Verdict Provision
headline: Takeda adjusted FY2025 earnings to a net loss after booking a legal provision of 402.5 billion JPY (~$2.5 billion) related to a jury verdict.
key_facts: Legal provision: 402.5 billion JPY ($2.5 billion) Swung full-year results to a net loss Published June 5, 2026

title: Supreme Court Sides with Hikma in "Skinny Label" Generics Patent Case
headline: In a key victory for generic drugmakers, the Supreme Court ruled in favor of Hikma in a closely watched skinny label patent case.
key_facts: Ruling issued around June 4, 2026 Described as a "big win for generics drugmakers"
